publications_must_include_substrings: what i learned starting a studio
notes: Creative resume — entirely lowercase! Tests case sensitivity in name detection (should still find 'tomás flores' even though normal-case detector expects capitalized first letter on each word — accents add another wrinkle). Section headers are also lowercase ('what i do well', 'where i've worked', 'education'). Speaking talks are publications-like. Job titles use 'Title — Org · Loc · Date' em-dash format BUT with lowercase brand names like 'airbnb', 'lyft'. Tough fixture by design — likely deterministic will struggle.
